pairs.question: Where and when were the 48th Primetime Emmy Awards held?
pairs.answer: The 48th Primetime Emmy Awards took place at the Pasadena Civic Auditorium in Pasadena, California. The awards were presented in two ceremonies: an untelevised one on September 7, 1996, and a televised one on September 8, 1996.

pairs.question: Who hosted the 48th Primetime Emmy Awards?
pairs.answer: The 48th Primetime Emmy Awards were hosted by Michael J. Fox, Paul Reiser, and Oprah Winfrey.

pairs.question: Which networks received their first major nominations at the 48th Primetime Emmy Awards?
pairs.answer: A&E and AMC received their first major nominations at the 48th Primetime Emmy Awards.

pairs.question: How many awards were presented during the televised ceremony of the 48th Primetime Emmy Awards?
pairs.answer: The televised ceremony of the 48th Primetime Emmy Awards presented 27 awards.

pairs.question: Which show won Outstanding Comedy Series at the 48th Primetime Emmy Awards, and how many times had it won previously?
pairs.answer: Frasier won Outstanding Comedy Series at the 48th Primetime Emmy Awards, marking its third consecutive win in this category.

pairs.question: What were the major awards won by ER at the 48th Primetime Emmy Awards?
pairs.answer: ER won Outstanding Drama Series at the 48th Primetime Emmy Awards. This was the only major award ER won despite entering the ceremony as the most nominated drama.

pairs.question: Which show made Emmy history at the 48th Primetime Emmy Awards, and what was the historical achievement?
pairs.answer: The HBO comedy The Larry Sanders Show made Emmy history by becoming the first show outside the Big Three television networks to receive the most major nominations (10).

pairs.question: Who was the first HBO actor to win a Supporting Comedy actor award, and at which ceremony?
pairs.answer: Rip Torn won the Supporting Comedy actor award at the 48th Primetime Emmy Awards, marking the first win for HBO in this category.

pairs.question: What records did Angela Lansbury set at the 48th Primetime Emmy Awards?
pairs.answer: Angela Lansbury set two records at the 48th Primetime Emmy Awards: being the most nominated actress in the Outstanding Lead Actress in a Drama Series category (18 nominations) and the most nominated actress without a win. Both records remain unbroken.
